L66 [lemma, top_level] PIR_correct: lemma PIR_correct &m i0 : 0 <= i0 < N => Pr [PIR.main(i0) @ &m : res = a i0] = 1%r. L95 [lemma, top_level] PIR_secuity_s'_byequiv: lemma PIR_secuity_s'_byequiv i1 i2 &m1 &m2 x: Pr[PIR.main(i1) @ &m1 : PIR.s' = x] = Pr[PIR.main(i2) @ &m2 : PIR.s' = x].
